task_completion.description: Agent accessed the Floreant POS login screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS login screen with a numpad is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Floreant POS Back Office.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS Back Office dashboard or main menu is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent created a virtual printer named 'Bar Printer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Virtual Printer' configuration window, dialog, or list showing 'Bar Printer' as a created or being-created virtual printer.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the 'Beverages' menu category for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Menu Category' edit screen or dialog is open specifically for the 'Beverages' category.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the 'Beverages' category to route to 'Bar Printer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Beverages' category settings, 'Bar Printer' is selected as the designated printer or routing destination, and the changes are saved or applied.

integrity.description: Agent used the Floreant POS GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Floreant POS graphical interface, not terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS application window is visible, not a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing Derby database SQL commands or scripts to insert the printer or update the category.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Back Office PIN is 1111. The virtual printer to be created must be named 'Bar Printer'. The menu category to be configured is 'Beverages'.
